pageContext.name: Front Man
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Tamashii nations are excited to present the Front Man Mini Figure!  Your favorite characters are stylized and squashed down to adorable palm-sized proportions with lifelike eyes and simple posability.  The Front Man from the hit Netflix drama 'Squid Game' joins the Figuarts Mini series. Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
